from sympy import S, I, Lambda, imageset, symbols
n = symbols('n')
S1 = imageset(Lambda(n, n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I), S.Integers)
print('S1 =', S1)
print('subset Reals =', S1.is_subset(S.Reals))
print('intersection =', S1.intersect(S.Reals), type(S1.intersect(S.Reals)))
print('2 in original =', 2 in S1)
print('2 in intersection =', 2 in S1.intersect(S.Reals))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
from sympy.solvers.solvers import solve_linear
f = n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I
n_ = Dummy(n.name, real=True)
re, im = f.subs(n,n_).as_real_imag()
im = expand_complex(im).subs(n_,n)
print('re=', re.subs(n_,n), 'im=', im, 'mul args=', Mul.make_args(im))
print('solutions=', [solve_linear(i,0) for i in Mul.make_args(im) if n in i.free_symbols])
S1 = imageset(Lambda(n,f), S.Integers)
print('S1 subset Reals:', S1.is_subset(S.Reals))
print('intersection:', S1.intersect(S.Reals), repr(S1.intersect(S.Reals)))
print('2 memberships:', S1.contains(2), S1.intersect(S.Reals).contains(2))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n, x
cases=[]
cases.append(imageset(Lambda(n,n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I),S.Integers))
im=(n-1)*(n+S.Half)
cases.append(imageset(Lambda(n,n+im*I),S.Integers))
cases.append(imageset(Lambda(n,n+im*(n+1)*I),S.Naturals0))
cases.append(imageset(Lambda(n,n/2+im.expand()*I),S.Integers))
cases.append(imageset(Lambda(n,n/(1/n-1)+im*(n+1)*I),S.Integers))
cases.append(imageset(Lambda(n,n/(n-6)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),S.Integers))
cases.append(imageset(Lambda(n,n/(n**2-9)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),S.Integers))
for j,c in enumerate(cases,1):
    try: print(j, c.intersect(S.Reals), repr(c.intersect(S.Reals)))
    except Exception as e: print(j,type(e).__name__,e)
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import S, I, Lambda, imageset, FiniteSet
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.sets.handlers.intersection import intersection_sets
A = imageset(Lambda(n, n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I), S.Integers)
print('A =', A)
print('A.contains(2) =', A.contains(2))
print('A.is_subset(Reals) =', A.is_subset(S.Reals))
print('Reals.is_subset(A) =', S.Reals.is_subset(A))
print('intersection_sets(A, Reals) =', intersection_sets(A, S.Reals))
print('A.intersect(Reals) =', A.intersect(S.Reals))
print('result repr =', repr(A.intersect(S.Reals)))
print('2 in intersection =', A.intersect(S.Reals).contains(2))
print('Integers - {-1, 1} =', S.Integers - FiniteSet(-1, 1))
print('imageset n over exclusion =', imageset(Lambda(n,n), S.Integers-FiniteSet(-1,1)))
PY"

fs=[n + (n-1)*(n+1)*I,
 n/(1/n-1)+im*(n+1)*I,

       print('denom',d,'correct factors',Mul.make_args(d),'solves',[solve_linear(a,0) for a in Mul.make_args(d) if n in a.free_symbols], 'bug factors',[solve_linear(a,0) for a in Mul.make_args(imi) if n in a.free_symbols])

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n,x
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex

def candidate(f, base_set):
    n_=Dummy(n.name,real=True)
    re,im=f.subs(n,n_).as_real_imag(); im=expand_complex(im)
    re=re.subs(n_,n); im=im.subs(n_,n)
    xs=[solve_linear(i,0) for i in Mul.make_args(im) if n in i.free_symbols]
    x,xis=zip(*xs)
    if x and all(i==n for i in x):
        base_set &= FiniteSet(*xis)
    else:
        base_set &= ConditionSet(n,Eq(im,0),S.Integers)
    print(' after imag',base_set)
    for i in denoms(f):
       if i.has(n):
         sol=list(zip(*[solve_linear(j,0) for j in Mul.make_args(i) if n in j.free_symbols]))
         if sol:
           xx,xsi=sol
           if xx and all(j==n for j in xx):
             base_set -= FiniteSet(*xsi)
           else:
             base_set -= ConditionSet(n,Eq(i,0),S.Integers)
         else:
           base_set -= ConditionSet(n,Eq(i,0),S.Integers)
    print(' after denom',base_set)
    return imageset(Lambda(n,re),base_set)

im=(n-1)*(n+S.Half)
fs=[(n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I,S.Integers),
(n+im*I,S.Integers),
(n+im*(n+1)*I,S.Naturals0),
(n/2+expand(im)*I,S.Integers),
(n/(1/n-1)+im*(n+1)*I,S.Integers),
(n/(n-6)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),S.Integers),
(n/(n**2-9)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),S.Integers)]
for f,b in fs:
 print('\\n',f, candidate(f,b))

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n,x
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex

def candidate(f, base_set):
    n_=Dummy(n.name,real=True)
    re,im=f.subs(n,n_).as_real_imag(); im=expand_complex(im)
    re=re.subs(n_,n); im=im.subs(n_,n)
    xs=[solve_linear(i,0) for i in Mul.make_args(im) if n in i.free_symbols]
    x,xis=zip(*xs)
    if x and all(i==n for i in x):
        base_set &= FiniteSet(*xis)
    else:
        base_set &= ConditionSet(n,Eq(im,0),S.Integers)
    print(' after imag',base_set)
    for i in denoms(f):
       if i.has(n):
         sol=list(zip(*[solve_linear(j,0) for j in Mul.make_args(i) if n in j.free_symbols]))
         if sol:
           xx,xsi=sol
           if xx and all(j==n for j in xx):
             base_set -= FiniteSet(*xsi)
           else:
             base_set -= ConditionSet(n,Eq(i,0),S.Integers)
         else:
           base_set -= ConditionSet(n,Eq(i,0),S.Integers)
    print(' after denom',base_set)
    return imageset(Lambda(n,re),base_set)

im=(n-1)*(n+S.Half)
fs=[(n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I,S.Integers),
(n+im*I,S.Integers),
(n+im*(n+1)*I,S.Naturals0),
(n/2+expand(im)*I,S.Integers),
(n/(1/n-1)+im*(n+1)*I,S.Integers),
(n/(n-6)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),S.Integers),
(n/(n**2-9)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),S.Integers)]
for f,b in fs:
 print('\\n',f, candidate(f,b))
PY"

from sympy import S, Lambda, imageset
from sympy.abc import n
s = imageset(Lambda(n, 1/n), S.Integers)
print('subset:', s.is_subset(S.Reals))
print('intersection:', s.intersect(S.Reals))
PY"
